dict.source: In this theme, you can use ==~~your words~~==, *==~~your words~~==* and *~~your words~~* to obtain a cloze-style, active this option to cancel it
dict.target: In this theme, you can use ==~~your words~~==, *==~~your words~~==* and *~~your words~~* to obtain a cloze-style, active this option to cancel it

dict.source: Cloze Style One, i.e. ==~~your words~~==, hovering to find "your words", should declare "cssclass：cloze" in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode
dict.target: Cloze Style One, i.e. ==~~your words~~==, hovering to find "your words", should declare "cssclass：cloze" in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode

dict.source: Can type 'solid', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy' or 'double' for Cloze Style One, i.e. ==~~your words~~==, hovering to find "your words", should declare "cssclass：cloze" in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode

dict.source: Cancel click the link to trigger auto-jump
dict.target: Cancel click the link to trigger auto-jump

dict.source: You can click on the link by holding down the ctrl key to jump
dict.target: You can click on the link by holding down the ctrl key to jump

dict.source: Disable this if you are using your own implementation via a CSS Snippet.
dict.target: Disable this if you are using your own implementation via a CSS Snippet.

dict.source: You can add 🔸|Left (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left` before), 🔸|Right (right/RIGHT/R) and 🔸|Inline (inline/INLINE/inl/INL/Inl) 🔸|Centre/Center (CENTRE/CENTER/centre/center/C) (the “centre” one is for the “Obsidian Default Image Position above only, because Topaz's default image position is in the centre) into a image format to adjust the image position, e.g. ![[*.jpg|L]], ![[*.png|Right|200]] and ![|inl](...*.jpg)
dict.target: You can add 🔸|Left (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left` before), 🔸|Right (right/RIGHT/R) and 🔸|Inline (inline/INLINE/inl/INL/Inl) 🔸|Centre/Center (CENTRE/CENTER/centre/center/C) (the “centre” one is for the “Obsidian Default Image Position above only, because Topaz's default image position is in the centre) into a image format to adjust the image position, e.g. ![[*.jpg|L]], ![[*.png|Right|200]] and ![|inl](...*.jpg)

dict.source: You can add 🔸#Left|your captions (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left`), 🔸#Right (or right/RIGHT/R)|your captions, 🔸#center/centre (CENTRE/CENTER/Center/Centre/C) |your captions and 🔸#inl (Inline/INLINE/inline/INL/Inl) |your captions into a image format to adjust the image position with a image caption, e.g. ![[*.jpg#left|Figure 1]], ![[*.png#right|Figure 2|200]], ![[*.jpg#centre|Figure 3]] and ![[*.jpg#inl|Figure 4|100]]
dict.target: You can add 🔸#Left|your captions (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left`), 🔸#Right (or right/RIGHT/R)|your captions, 🔸#center/centre (CENTRE/CENTER/Center/Centre/C) |your captions and 🔸#inl (Inline/INLINE/inline/INL/Inl) |your captions into a image format to adjust the image position with a image caption, e.g. ![[*.jpg#left|Figure 1]], ![[*.png#right|Figure 2|200]], ![[*.jpg#centre|Figure 3]] and ![[*.jpg#inl|Figure 4|100]]

dict.source: You can add 🔸|+grid into some images to grid these images in a line, e.g. ![[*.jpg|+grid]] Or type ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ in YAML to make images arrange in a grid in the preview mode. require Contextual Typography plugin
dict.target: You can add 🔸|+grid into some images to grid these images in a line, e.g. ![[*.jpg|+grid]] Or type ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ in YAML to make images arrange in a grid in the preview mode. require Contextual Typography plugin

dict.target: List in a horizontal row (inline list)

dict.source: ❗cssclass：inline-list❗ To make the list show in a horizontal row. Meanwhile, it makes the list show inline which can be used with inline images (like ![[xxx.jpg|inlineR]])
